title: Learning Technology Designer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Learning Technology Designer to design and develop high-quality e-learning and digital learning content, including CBTs, videos, and multimedia learning assets.

This is a hands-on role combining instructional design, e-learning content development, and project coordination. You will work closely with subject matter experts (SMEs) and stakeholders to translate training requirements into engaging and effective digital learning experiences.

What You Will Be Working On

Learning Design & Content Development

  • Translate training requirements into structured e-learning modules, CBTs, videos, and multimedia learning assets
  • Apply instructional design and adult learning principles to shape content flow, interactions, and assessments
  • Design learning structures, storyboards, and scripts that define content flow, interactions and assessments
  • Develop interactive e-learning modules/digital content using authoring tools, and create or integrate supporting multimedia assets such as graphics, audio, and video
  • Use appropriate multimedia and AI-assisted tools to enhance clarity, engagement and production efficiency

Stakeholder & Project Coordination

  • Work with SMEs and stakeholders to review content and incorporate feedback
  • Manage development timelines, revisions and deliverables across multiple projects
  • Maintain documentation and review records

Quality Assurance & Delivery

  • Perform quality checks to ensure accuracy, usability, and consistency
  • Verify content functionality prior to delivery or deployment

What We Are Looking For

  • Diploma or Degree in Instructional Design, Education, Adult Training, Media, Technology or a related field
  • 2–5 years of experience in e-learning, instructional design, or digital content development
  • Strong understanding of instructional design and learning design principles
  • Knowledge in e-learning standards (SCORM, xAPI)
  • Hands-on experience developing e-learning content using authoring tools
  • Ability to work with SMEs to translate subject matter into learner-friendly content
  • Good communication, organisation, and time-management skills
  • Comfortable managing multiple tasks and working to project timelines
  • Experience in any of the following, working with LMS platforms, video production or editing, UX/UI, project management and client management would be a plus

postedCompany.description: To be the leading Training & Development Solutions Provider, Aviationlearn aims to integrate and blend the technology-enabled and resource intensive e-Learning enterprise with traditional learning to  workplace learning. We develop E-Learning content and Training Simulations customized to the training needs of adult learners. By combining information technological innovation with customer focus services, the company is committed to bringing the best in educational resources to adult learning globally. Our specialized and turnkey e-learning solutions enhance the delivery of existing educational and training programs for our clients.
postedCompany.name: AVIATIONLEARN PTE. LTD.
